JHIN-COMMON_SHOT.title: Common Shot
JHIN-PERFECT_SHOT.title: Perfect Shot
JHIN-PERFECT_SHOT.description:
Spend 1 [gold]Bullet[/gold].
Deal !D! damage.
[gold]Flourish[/gold]: gain 1 Energy-. -+ and draw 1 card.+
JHIN-WHISPER_BURST.title: Whisper Burst
JHIN-GRACEFUL_FOOTWORK.title: Graceful Footwork
JHIN-GRACEFUL_FOOTWORK.description:
Gain !B! Block.
If you played a [gold]Shoot[/gold] card this turn, gain -3-+4+ additional Block.
JHIN-AIM_SHOT.title: Aim Shot
JHIN-PIERCING_ROUND.title: Piercing Round
JHIN-PIERCING_ROUND.description:
Spend 1 [gold]Bullet[/gold].
Deal !D! damage to all enemies.
JHIN-DANCING_GRENADE.title: Dancing Grenade
JHIN-DANCING_GRENADE.description:
Deal !D! damage.
If it kills, repeat on another random enemy with -3-+4+ more damage.
JHIN-FINISH_OFF.title: Finish Off
JHIN-FINISH_OFF.description:
Deal !D! damage.
If the target is below 50% HP, deal -5-+7+ additional damage.
JHIN-ART_SLICE.title: Art Slice
JHIN-ART_SLICE.description:
Deal !D! damage.
If the target has [gold]Weak[/gold], deal -6-+8+ additional damage.
JHIN-SIDESTEP_FIRE.title: Sidestep Fire
JHIN-QUICK_DRAW.title: Quick Draw
JHIN-REHEARSAL_SHOT.title: Rehearsal Shot
JHIN-REHEARSAL_SHOT.description:
Spend 1 [gold]Bullet[/gold].
Deal !D! damage.
If not [gold]Flourish[/gold], draw 1 card.
JHIN-GUNFLAME_GRAZE.title: Gunflame Graze
JHIN-GUNFLAME_GRAZE.description:
Spend 1 [gold]Bullet[/gold].
Deal !D! damage.
Apply 1 [gold]Weak[/gold].
[gold]Flourish[/gold]: apply -2-+3+ instead.
JHIN-INTERMISSION_KILL.title: Intermission Kill
JHIN-INTERMISSION_KILL.description:
Deal !D! damage.
If the target has [gold]Mark[/gold], gain -4-+6+ Block.
JHIN-ENCORE_BULLET.title: Encore Bullet
JHIN-ENCORE_BULLET.description:
Spend 1 [gold]Bullet[/gold].
Deal !D! damage.
If you played a Skill this turn, deal -5-+6+ additional damage.
JHIN-WHISPERED_THREAT.title: Whispered Threat
JHIN-SET_THE_STAGE.title: Set the Stage
JHIN-SET_THE_STAGE.description:
Gain !B! Block.
Apply -1-+2+ [gold]Mark[/gold] to a random enemy.
JHIN-CALCULATED_PLAN.title: Calculated Plan
JHIN-CALCULATED_PLAN.description:
Draw 2 cards.
If you have -1-+1 or 0+ [gold]Bullet[/gold], gain 1 Energy.
JHIN-BACKSTEP.title: Backstep
JHIN-BACKSTEP.description:
Gain !B! Block.
If you played a [gold]Shoot[/gold] card this turn, draw 1 card.
JHIN-SET_TRAP.title: Set a Trap
JHIN-SET_TRAP.description:
Gain !B! Block.
Apply 1 [gold]Lotus Trap[/gold] to the target.
JHIN-CALM_RELOAD.title: Calm Reload
JHIN-OBSERVE_WEAKNESS.title: Observe Weakness
JHIN-OBSERVE_WEAKNESS.description:
Apply -2-+3+ [gold]Mark[/gold].
If the target is below 50% HP, draw 1 card.
JHIN-PERFECT_STANCE.title: Perfect Stance
JHIN-PERFECT_STANCE.description:
Gain !B! Block.
If you have 4 [gold]Bullets[/gold], gain -6-+8+ additional Block.
JHIN-AWAIT_APPLAUSE.title: Await Applause
JHIN-AWAIT_APPLAUSE.description:
Gain !B! Block.
Next turn start: gain 1 Energy.
JHIN-COUNT_BEATS.title: Count Beats
JHIN-COUNT_BEATS.description:
Draw -1-+2+ card(s).
If you have 1 [gold]Bullet[/gold], draw 1 more.
[gold]Exhaust.[/gold]
JHIN-COMPOSED.title: Composed
JHIN-COMPOSED.description: The first [gold]Flourish[/gold] each combat: draw 2 cards.
JHIN-MUZZLE_RHYTHM.title: Muzzle Rhythm
JHIN-MUZZLE_RHYTHM.description: Every 4th Attack card played: gain 1 Strength-. -+ and 1 Dexterity.+
JHIN-AUDIENCE_SEATED.title: Audience Seated
JHIN-SHOW_PLAN.title: Show Plan
JHIN-BLOODY_STAGE.title: Bloody Stage
JHIN-BLOODY_STAGE.description: When an enemy first drops below 50% HP, apply -2-+3+ [gold]Mark[/gold].
JHIN-INTERMISSION.title: Intermission
JHIN-INTERMISSION.description: The first non-Shoot Attack each turn deals -3-+5+ additional damage.
JHIN-GUN_MAINTENANCE.title: Gun Maintenance
JHIN-GUN_MAINTENANCE.description: Whenever you reload, draw 1 card-. -+ and gain 2 Block.+
JHIN-ACTORS_INSTINCT.title: Actor's Instinct
JHIN-ACTORS_INSTINCT.description: If you didn't [gold]Flourish[/gold] this turn, gain 1 Strength next turn-. -+ and 1 Dexterity.+
JHIN-STAGE_CONTROL.title: Stage Control
JHIN-GRAND_STAGE.title: Grand Stage
JHIN-GRAND_STAGE.description:
Gain !B! Block.
Apply 1 [gold]Lotus Trap[/gold] to all enemies.
JHIN-LONG_RANGE_SNIPE.title: Long-Range Snipe
JHIN-LONG_RANGE_SNIPE.description:
Spend 1 [gold]Bullet[/gold].
Deal !D! damage.
Deal -3-+4+ additional damage per [gold]Mark[/gold] on the target.
JHIN-DEADLY_FLOURISH.title: Deadly Flourish
JHIN-DEADLY_FLOURISH.description:
Spend 1 [gold]Bullet[/gold].
Deal !D! damage.
If the target has [gold]Mark[/gold], apply -1-+2+ [gold]Vulnerable[/gold].
[gold]Flourish[/gold]: apply -2-+3+ instead.
JHIN-RELOAD.title: Reload
JHIN-RELOAD.description:
Reload your [gold]Bullets[/gold] to 4.
Draw -1-+2+ card(s).
You cannot [gold]Flourish[/gold] this turn.
[gold]Exhaust.[/gold]
JHIN-FOURTH_ACT.title: Fourth Act
JHIN-FOURTH_ACT.description:
Can only be played with 1 [gold]Bullet[/gold].
Spend 1 [gold]Bullet[/gold].
Deal !D! damage.
[gold]Flourish[/gold]: apply -3-+4+ [gold]Vulnerable[/gold].
JHIN-FLOURISH_TEMPO.title: Flourish Tempo
JHIN-FLOURISH_TEMPO.description: Whenever you trigger [gold]Flourish[/gold], gain 1 Energy-. -+ and draw 1 card.+
JHIN-CURTAIN_CALL.title: Curtain Call
JHIN-CURTAIN_CALL.description:
Can only be played with 0 [gold]Bullets[/gold].
Attack random enemies {shotCount} times for !D! damage.
Lower-HP targets take more damage, up to {maxDamageBonusPercent}% more.
[gold]Exhaust.[/gold]
JHIN-SHOOT_DISABLED_NO_BULLETS: The chamber is empty... but art never relied on gunpowder.
